calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment on First Amended Cross-Complaint.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Crisostomo G. Ibarra, Esq., appearing for Defendants and Cross-Complainants Moonrise Productions, Inc., Gary Lingsheim and Jenny Deng.
No appearance on behalf or by Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant Elsepage LLC.
Defendants and Cross-Complainants Gary Klingsheim and Jenny Deng sworn and examined on their own behalf.
The following exhibits were marked on behalf of Cross-Complainants:
Cross-complainants exhibit 1. Group of documents dated April 1, 2013 for Id/Evid.
Cross-complainants exhibit 2. Group of documents dated February 5, 2013 for Id/Evid.
Cross-complainants exhibit 3. Group of e-mails for Id/Evid.
After evidence, Court ordered counsel for Cross-Complainant to file Memorandum of Points and authorities in support of his Offer of Proof as to all causes of action. Memorandum to be filed on or before August 30, 2013 with a courtesy copy delivered directly to department 514. Counsel to provide a proposed judgment for the court's signature. The court deems the matter submitted as of September 13, 2013 providing that counsel submits Memo timely.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike, To Dismiss, And For Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CRISOSTOMO G. IBARRA OF THE IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, TEL. NO. 398-5329 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MOONRISE PRODUCTIONS INC.'s Motion For Injunctive Relief is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Continued To Aug-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSHUA H. WATSON OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 421-2800 MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. CRISOSTOMO G. IBARRA, TEL. NO. 398-5329 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - BASED UPON THE INFORMATION PROVIDED TO THE COURT AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE DOLAN'S LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF ELSEPAGE LLC IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST HIRE AN ATTORNEY NO LATER THAN MARCH 15, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
